title: Pixel-oracle sweep absent: no systematic per-stage native-vs-ares screenshot lane (only per-fix ROI probes)

history.note: Assessed the S2 pixel lane. ares screenshot path WORKS: prebuilt instrumented ares (build/ares-movement-oracle) emits deterministic 640x480 stock PPMs at a checkpoint game-timer (dam_glass_visual_probe stock PPM byte-identical across 2 attempts). Classifier pipeline (pixel_normalize+pixel_diff vs APPROXIMATIONS.md) + self-test pass. Defect found: sense_pixel_sweep.sh native capture omitted --level and native_config, so the lane had NEVER captured a real ROM frame (booted to menu -> black frame, unique=3/black=100%, health-audit skip) and only its synthetic self-test ever ran.

Fixed the native capture (pass --level native_level + native_config --config-override) and ran the sweep end-to-end on Dam (level 33): real native-vs-ares verdict = 777 clusters, 775 AUTO-ATTRIBUTED to documented approximation classes (three_point_filter, vi_filter), 2 unexplained. The 2 unexplained are ROOT-CAUSED as a viewpoint-registration artifact (native warp-to-pad vs stock force-player differ ~14u + sub-degree angle), NOT renderer defects: native-vs-native identical params = 0 clusters; moving only the native look-target to the stock coords reproduces the identical frame-spanning cluster (bbox[0,19,640,442]). Filed as FID-0115 (camera registration), NOT allowlisted, NOT filed as parity-divergence. Wired ROM-gated ctest port_pixel_oracle_sweep_gate (--gate ratchet; skips clean w/o cache) + confirmed the injected-regression proof (self-test + a 40x40 garbage block on a real Dam frame -> 1 unexplained cluster mean_delta 199). HONEST COVERAGE: 1/20 stages captured (Dam); the other 19 need camera-registered checkpoints (blocked on FID-0115). Criterion-2 (zero unattributed clusters per stage) NOT yet met -> stays open at root-caused.
